nonGoals: Do not change any other function in tags.ts
Do not modify isTagSupportedByProvider() — it inherits the fix via delegation to getTagDef()
Do not rename, add, or remove tag definitions
Do not change the public API signature of getTagDef()
objective: Make SSML tag lookup case-insensitive in getTagDef() by lowercasing both sides of the comparison, and add corresponding test coverage.
planText: In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.ts, modify getTagDef() to compare t.tag.toLowerCase() === tagName.toLowerCase() instead of t.tag === tagName. In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.test.ts, add test cases for uppercase ('PROSODY'), mixed-case ('Break'), and lowercase ('emphasis') lookups, plus a negative case ('nonexistent'). Run npm run test to confirm all tests pass.
